query: INSERT INTO calendar_events (title, description, eventDate, eventType, symbol, importance) VALUES ('Microsoft Q2 2026 Earnings Report', 'Microsoft releases Q2 FY2026 financial results. EPS: $4.14 (beat $3.97 expected), Revenue: $81.27B (beat $80.27B expected). Cloud revenue topped $51.5B. Stock fell 7% on Azure growth concerns.', '2026-01-28 21:00:00', 'earnings', 'MSFT', 'high');
